mapper.select:
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, DEPARTMENT_ID, CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, DEFAULT_SITE_ID, DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, PHONE_OFFICE, PHONE_MOBILE, PHONE_HOME, PHONE_OTHER, EMAIL_ID, SEX_FLAG, BIRTHDAY, EXPIRE_DATE, PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, ENTER_DATE, RETIRE_DATE, LAST_HOST_NAME, LAST_LOGIN_DTTM, LAST_IPV4_ADDRESS, LAST_IPV6_ADDRESS, LAST_MAC_ADDRESS, LAST_MAC_ADDRESS2, USER_GROUP1, USER_GROUP2, USER_GROUP3, USER_GROUP4, USER_GROUP5, USER_GROUP6, USER_GROUP7, USER_GROUP8, USER_GROUP9, USER_GROUP10, DELETE_FLAG, DELETE_DATE, DELETE_COMMENT, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM FROM NB_USERS WHERE 1 = 1
AND (DELETE_FLAG IS NULL OR DELETE_FLAG != 'Y')
AND DEFAULT_SITE_ID = #{siteId}
AND USER_ID LIKE '%' + #{userId} + '%'
ORDER BY USER_ID ASC

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, DEPARTMENT_ID, CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, DEFAULT_SITE_ID, DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, PHONE_OFFICE, PHONE_MOBILE, PHONE_HOME, PHONE_OTHER, EMAIL_ID, SEX_FLAG, BIRTHDAY, EXPIRE_DATE, PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, ENTER_DATE, RETIRE_DATE, LAST_HOST_NAME, LAST_LOGIN_DTTM, LAST_IPV4_ADDRESS, LAST_IPV6_ADDRESS, LAST_MAC_ADDRESS, LAST_MAC_ADDRESS2, USER_GROUP1, USER_GROUP2, USER_GROUP3, USER_GROUP4, USER_GROUP5, USER_GROUP6, USER_GROUP7, USER_GROUP8, USER_GROUP9, USER_GROUP10, DELETE_FLAG, DELETE_DATE, DELETE_COMMENT, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM, ENCODE_PASSWORD FROM NB_USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NB_USERS ( USER_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, DEPARTMENT_ID, CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, DEFAULT_SITE_ID, DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, PHONE_OFFICE, PHONE_MOBILE, PHONE_HOME, PHONE_OTHER, EMAIL_ID, SEX_FLAG, BIRTHDAY, EXPIRE_DATE, PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, ENTER_DATE, RETIRE_DATE, USER_GROUP1, USER_GROUP2, USER_GROUP3, USER_GROUP4, USER_GROUP5, USER_GROUP6, USER_GROUP7, USER_GROUP8, USER_GROUP9, USER_GROUP10, DELETE_FLAG, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{departmentId}, #{changePasswordFlag}, #{defaultSiteId}, #{defaultLanguageId}, #{phoneOffice}, #{phoneMobile}, #{phoneHome}, #{phoneOther}, #{emailId}, #{sexFlag}, #{birthday}, #{expireDate}, #{passExpireDate}, #{enterDate}, #{retireDate}, #{userGroup1}, #{userGroup2}, #{userGroup3}, #{userGroup4}, #{userGroup5}, #{userGroup6}, #{userGroup7}, #{userGroup8}, #{userGroup9}, #{userGroup10}, 'N', #{creatorId}, FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'), #{creatorId}, FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') )
